name: Cheese Squash Casserole
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the yellow squash and onions into bite-sized pieces.
2. Cook the squash and onions in a small amount of water until tender; drain well.
3. Mash the cooked squash and onions with a fork.
4. Add parsley flakes, salt, pepper, butter cracker crumbs, cheese, milk or cream, and Parmesan cheese to the mashed mixture. Reserve some cheese for topping.
5. Transfer the mixture to a greased baking dish.
6. Bake at 350°F (175°C) for 25 minutes, or until heated through and lightly browned on top.
